title: Koopa's Critters
description: Adds obscure & endangered animals to minecraft
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/120b72246fea7d28b1ec25f140f255c5297a9660_0.webp)


Welcome to Koopa's Critters!

**Mod requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)!**

Koopa's Critters adds around 45+ lesser known and/or endangered species to your minecraft world! Currently Koopa's Critters is being worked on 1.20.1 Forge & 1.21.1 Neoforge (Though on Curseforge there is old 1.12.2 & 1.16.5 versions from 2020-2022.) The mod is survival friendly with animals spawning and some having features and items. Unique behavior can also be seen between some species such as predation. Along with animals, Koopa's Critters also adds a few natural features such as Kopje Trees & Kopje Granite in Savvanahs. Some Decorations include several new paintings! 

The mod can be configured to enable and disable specific animals and more.  (Note you can use a mod like Forge Config Screens to edit the config settings ingame!) 

I hope our mod can help spread awareness on lesser known species especially highly endangered species!

**Credits:**
- Head Artist, Coder & Animator: Marioz170 (AKA Redkoopa)
- Contributing Artists: Cody, Maple Moose, Anomalocaris
- Texture Contributors: Arzher (Current Impala, Giant Muntjac & Helmeted Guineafowl) & Radicalvice (1.12.2's Helmeted Guineafowl)
- Sounds Contributor: Mr. Esuoh
- Base code using Mcreator!

1.20.1 & 1.21.1 Ports are still in active development and roster will be updated as animals come out. (About 15 or so from the 1.16.5 version haven't been re-implemented into 1.20.1+ versions.)

**Roster:**

**Mammals:**
- Attenborough's Echidna
- Binturong
- Bush Dog
- Chacoan Peccary
- Rock Hyrax
- Impala
- Klipspringer
- Southern Patas Monkey (2 variants)
- Marsupial Mole
- Giant Muntjac Deer
- Pallas's Cat
- Asian Leopard Cat
- Tibetan Fox
- Matschie's Tree Kangaroo
- Bald Uakari Monkey
- Cape Buffalo

**Birds:**
- Burrowing Owl
- California Quail
- Helmeted Guineafowl
- Marabou Stork
- Rock Ptarmigan (3 skin variants)
- South Island Takahe
- Spoonbill (has 6 species variants)
- Northern Rockhopper Penguin
- Yellow-eye Penguin
- Chinstrap Penguin
- Gentoo Penguin

**Reptiles & Amphibians:**
- Fire Salamander
- Fly River Turtle
- Pancake Tortoise
- Galapagos Pink Land Iguana
- Mexican Rosy Boa
- Tricolor Hognose Snake
- Yangtze Giant Softshell Turtle

**Invertebrates:**
- Candy Cane Snail
- Pink Velvet Worm
- Headlight Beetle
- Upside-down Jelly
- Psychedelic Jelly

**Fish:**
- Bonnethead Shark
- Bowmouth Guitarfish
- Goblin Shark
- Oceanic Manta Ray
- Ocellate River Ray
- Agazzi's Cichlid
